name: Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 cans Italian style crushed tomatoes, 28 oz. each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook and stir the Italian sausage with onions until the meat is brown (remove skin from sausage if desired). Drain excess fat.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except spaghetti to the pot.
3. Bring sauce to a boil. Reduce heat and partly cover the pot. Simmer for 2 hours, stirring occasionally. If using a crockpot, simmer with less water (1 or 1 1/2 cups) according to preference.
4. After cooling, freeze portions in containers: spaghetti - 4 cup container; French Bread Pizza - 3 cup container; Calzones - 2 1-quart freezer bags.
5. To serve SPAGHETTI, thaw sauce and heat in a medium saucepan. Cook pasta as directed on package, then pour sauce over cooked pasta.
6. Sauce can also be used for: French Bread Pizza, Manicotti, or Calzones.
